title: Place Chest On Boat
body:
# Place Chest On Boat

**This mod will make it easier for you to make chest boat.**

## *Features*

* **Now you can just shift right-click the boat with the chest to get the chest boat.**
* **Compatible with the *CarryOn* mod, carrying the chest and right-clicking on the boat will make it the chest boat, items in the chest will be retained**
